title: The Ancestral Release and Wealth Lineage Activation
subtitle: A ten-minute ceremony for closing the door on inherited financial struggle and opening a new generational story.
excerpt: The Week 2 closing ritual from Rebecca's Money Journal. A release-and-allow ceremony for letting go of the money patterns inherited from your family line and activating a new wealth lineage going forward.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 2 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the end of Week 2 of the MONEY program, or any time you want to formally close a chapter on inherited money struggle and name a new one.

content.text: The Week 2 closing ritual from Rebecca's Money Journal. A ten-minute ceremony for releasing the money patterns inherited through the family line and activating a new one. Use alone or at the end of a full Day 14 practice.

Sit quietly somewhere you won't be interrupted. Take three slow breaths. Visualise your family line standing behind you (parents, grandparents, ancestors), each one placing a hand on your shoulder in support. They are not the burden; they are the foundation.
I am ready to release all fear, struggle, and scarcity passed down through my family line. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow ease, wealth, and stability for myself and every generation that follows. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

Take a slow, full breath in, and all the way out again. Let any remaining tension release on the exhale. Visualise golden light moving backward and forward through your family tree: healing what came before, blessing what comes after, anchoring abundance in the present.
This week, I am grateful that I am the turning point in my family's story of wealth.
Write this sentence in your own handwriting. Say it aloud. Let it land.
Adapted from the Week 2 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
